response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 19+ years of development experience, the resume fails to meet critical required qualifications. Most significantly, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is explicitly required. Additionally, the candidate's background is primarily in full-stack web, mobile, and some embedded systems development, with no documented expertise in embedded networking security technologies (encryption/key exchange, authentication systems, attack detection) or Linux kernel development. The C proficiency exists but is dated (2014-2015), with recent work focused on TypeScript and higher-level languages.
strengths: Extensive 19+ year software engineering background with proven ability to own complex systems end-to-end
Demonstrated Linux system administration, CI/CD infrastructure, and DevOps skills from GitLab and Docker work
Strong commitment to testing, code quality, and mentorship with multiple workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency (required qualification)
Missing all core embedded networking security expertise: no documented experience with encryption technologies, authentication systems (802.1X, Captive Portal), or attack/tamper detection
Limited embedded systems specialization—background is primarily full-stack web/mobile with minimal low-level hardware or network switch development

key_factors.factor: General software engineering maturity and testing culture
